title: Dr. Liu Qiang, Director of Energy Economics Division, Chinese Academy of Social Sciences
description: Dr. Liu Qiang, Director of Energy Economics Division, Inst. of Quantitative & Technical Economics at Chinese Academy of Social Sciences, Associate Professor, Graduate School of CASS addresses the Schiller Institute's "U.S.-China Cooperation on the Belt & Road Initiative," exploring the corresponding ideas in Chinese and Western thought, April 13-14, 2017.
